---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## 📌 Summary
A short, clear description of the feature.

---

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this solve?  
Who is impacted?  
Why is this important?

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the desired behavior in detail.

- What should happen?
- What should change?
- What should remain unchanged?

---

## 🔍 Scope
Indicate the scope of this request:

- [ ] UI change
- [ ] API change
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Developer experience
- [ ] Security enhancement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds.

---

## 📊 Impact Assessment
- Affected users:
- Breaking change? (Yes/No):
- Estimated complexity (Low / Medium / High):
- Dependencies:

---

## 🧪 Acceptance Criteria
Define clear, testable conditions:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

---

## 📎 Additional Context
Screenshots, diagrams, related issues (#123), references, etc.
